title: eragrostis barrelieri subsp. pygmaea
intro: Eragrostis barrelieri subsp. pygmaea is a plant species in the family Poaceae, commonly known as a type of grass. It is used in traditional medicine due to its medicinal properties, which include anti-inflammatory, antimicrobial, and antioxidant effects. The health benefits of Eragrostis barrelieri subsp. pygmaea include its potential to reduce inflammation, improve wound healing, and protect against oxidative stress. The plant is often used to prepare herbal teas, infusions, and tinctures, which are believed to have various health benefits and are used in traditional medicine practices.
